name: DAMN.
description:
So I come back home, just to find out that the computer I make bots on has forever stopped working.

And what I mean by that is that it wont turn on, it wont charge, and it wont connect to my TV.

I’m gonna miss this laptop, it has served me well, even though it wont update, it wont install programs, and the screen is so cracked that I have to use it via HDMI-to-TV with a wireless USB mouse.

Even in its last final days on life support, it served me well. This laptop is what made all my peak bots.

So may we take a moment of silence for our dearly beloved...

Rest easy, Lenovo Ideapad...

(and btw I would make bots on the phone but the phone I am typing this with is some straight BS. Apple paying me bills just to install a free app.)
creator: BonkSpiegel
